title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: First-time app launch shows license agreement, login options (Microsoft/Apple/Google/username-password), and navigates to Home Screen on successful login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. On the License Agreement screen, tap "Accept" to proceed.
3. On the Login screen, observe the available login options.
4. Tap "Skip" to bypass login (if desired) and verify navigation to the Home Screen.

5. Alternatively, select one of the following login methods:
   - Tap "Sign in with Microsoft"
   - Tap "Sign in with Apple"
   - Tap "Sign in with Google"
   - Tap "Sign in with Username/Password" and enter valid credentials.
6. Complete the authentication flow for the chosen method.
7. Verify that after successful login, the app navigates to the Home Screen.
expected: User can accept the license agreement, see login options (Microsoft, Apple, Google, Username/Password), skip login, or complete login. Successful login navigates to the Home Screen.
